title: Registry Publication, SBOM, Provenance, Vulnerabilities, Policies, and CI Release · Mastery Check
summary: A release board compares fresh registry publication, sbom, provenance, vulnerabilities, policies, and ci release decisions and accepts only answers tied to observable image, container, build, or Compose evidence. Planned artifact: Record independent decisions and explanations for signed and policy-gated image release packet. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Publish least-privilege authenticated content, verify digest after push, handle immutable tags, retention, mirrors, rate limits, and failure without credential leakage.
Generate, attach, inspect, export, validate, and interpret SPDX SBOM attestations including build-stage and final-image coverage.
Produce minimal or maximal SLSA provenance, locate materials and parameters, protect secret values, and verify the statement against source and builder policy.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# docker-basics cumulative container delivery portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic manifest and evidence review only.
# They never connect to a Docker daemon, mount a socket, or execute learner commands.
workspace: docker
version-baseline:
  engine: 29.6.1
  compose: 5.3.1
  buildx: 0.35.0
  buildkit: 0.31.1
  dockerfile-frontend: 1.25
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Registry Auth Push Pull
steps.instruction:
Order the Docker Registry Auth Push Pull container delivery evidence cycle for this quiz task before implementing it.

Evidence target: Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Registry Auth Push Pull.
steps.why: Correct order keeps Docker Registry Auth Push Pull assumptions visible before execution and verifies its result against a boundary case afterward. For Reconstruct the defensible process · Quiz Docker Registry Auth Push Pull, keep Docker Registry Auth Push Pull connected to mechanically reviewable Docker artifact and transfer evidence.
